metadata.description: AGI Lab plugins and hackathon starter templates for Claude Code.

plugins.name: hackathon-starter
plugins.description: Starter plugin for AGI Lab hackathon participants. Fork, rename, and turn this into your own shareable skill.

plugins.name: terminal-vibes
plugins.description: Spinning ASCII donuts, cat art, dad jokes, and Matrix rain. Pure terminal fun, no API keys needed.
